reply:
[[BLOCK:slide24_shape1]]
Two Stages  
Stage 1: Fit the model to generate the components required for Stage 2 (predictors and their slope estimates).  
Stage 2: Use the components from Stage 1 and make adjustments.  
Applicable to wide data structures: when the sample size is smaller than the number of predictors.  
Stage 2 does not impose excessive penalties on the included components.
